title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 214.120 - Costs, who liable for
text:
214.120.  Costs, who liable for. — The cost of the prosecution under the provisions of this chapter, and all other costs necessarily incurred in superintending and protecting such burying grounds or cemeteries, shall be a charge upon the owners, for the time being, of the tracts of land of which such grounds were formerly a part, and shall be collected as other costs in actions for trespass.
(RSMo 1939 § 15265) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 14056; 1919 § 1084; 1909 § 1306
